chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI S.M.A. No. 405 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main petition. 17.12.2020 Mr. Syed Zeeshan Ali, advocate for petitioner. ----------- Through the instant petition, petitioner Hassan Ali has prayed for the grant of Succession Certificate in respect of moveable properties/assets, details whereof are mentioned in the Schedule of Properties attached with the memo of petition, available at page 39, which were left by his deceased paternal grandson, namely, Syed Huzaifa Imran Ali, who allegedly died on 22nd May, 2020 in the Air Crash of PIA plane in Model Colony, Karachi, leaving behind him three legal heirs, details whereof are mentioned in paragraph No. 3 of the memo of petition. Original Death Certificate of deceased as well as photostat copies of Family Registration Certificate, issued by the NADRA, Fatwa issued by the “Dar-ul-Ifta, Jamia Darul Uloom, Karachi”, Financial statements issued by the Pak Poly Industries and letters in respect of compensation issued by the PIA are also filed at page 15, 25 to 29, 37 and 41 to 77. Legal heirs No. 2 & 3 have filed their Affidavits of No-Objection for the grant of Succession Certificate in favour of the petitioner/legal heir No.1, which are available on record. Two witnesses, namely, Syed Haris Ahsan and Syed Mukhtar Ali Zaidi have also filed their respective affidavits and affirmed that there is no other legal heir of the deceased except mentioned above. Their affidavits are also available on record. 2 Notice of this petition was published in Daily “Jang” Karachi dated 12th November, 2020; however, none has filed any objection to the grant of Succession Certificate to petitioner, as per the report submitted by the Deputy Registrar (OS) on 3rd December, 2020.

Two witnesses, namely, Syed Haris Ahsan and Syed Mukhtar Ali Zaidi have also filed their respective affidavits and affirmed that there is no other legal heir of the deceased except mentioned above. Their affidavits are also available on record. 2 Notice of this petition was published in Daily “Jang” Karachi dated 12th November, 2020; however, none has filed any objection to the grant of Succession Certificate to petitioner, as per the report submitted by the Deputy Registrar (OS) on 3rd December, 2020. Today petitioner and legal heirs No. 2 & 3 as well as above named witnesses are present. They affirm the contents of memo of petition as well as their affidavits and also verify their signatures made thereon. Since all the legal formalities/requirements have been fulfilled, there is no impediment in grant of Succession Certificate to petitioner, therefore, the petition is allowed. The office is directed to issue Succession Certificate in respect of movable properties/assets shown in the Schedule of Properties, as per rules. J U D G E Athar Zai
